query: SELECT qv.id, qv.quoteId, qv.version, qv.totalAmount, qv.totalFinal, qv.createdAt, LEFT(qv.headerSnapshot, 300) as snapshotPreview, COUNT(qi.id) as itemCount FROM quote_versions qv LEFT JOIN quote_items qi ON qi.quoteVersionId = qv.id WHERE qv.quoteId = 4140001 GROUP BY qv.id ORDER BY qv.version;
